title: Medieval Additions
description: Adds multiple different items to your game!
body:
# Welcome to Medieval Additons V2.0.0 RC3

**THIS DESCRIPTION IS CURRENTLY NOT ACCURATE TO THE MOST RECENT VERSION, FOR A LIST OF CHANGES SINCE THEN, CHECK THE VERSION CHANGELOGS**

Currently, the mod only has a few items. For specific crafting recipes, please use the creative menu or JEI!

This mod adds the following:
- Copper Tools
- Steel Tools
- Molten Tools
- Enchanted Copper
- Reinforced Stick
- Molten Remains and Molten Infused Ingot
- 1 New Structure
- 7 Advancements
- 2 New Enhancement
- Soul Alter, used for crafting Molten Armor and Tools
  
## Copper Tools
Copper Tools are craftable by using Copper Ore in the regular format that any other tool would be crafted in (with the exception of the hoe.) As copper is pretty common, the durability for the entire set is low, and slightly weaker than the next set up. Enchanted Copper is a new variant of Copper, there are currently two ways to obtain it. With 2 Iron Ingots, 2 Copper Ingots, and 1 Gold Ingot, or you can find it in natural world generation at Y10 and below!

## Steel Tools
Steel Tools are a new middle ground between Iron and Diamond, crafted with Reinforced Sticks and Steel Ore, Steel can be found from Y40 - 0, Reinforced Sticks are able to be crafted using a stick and a piece of Iron.

## Molten Tools
Molten Tools are a new upgraded version of Netherite Tools, they are crafted by using Netherite Tools with the mix of a Molten Infused Ingot and Soul Essence inside of the new Soul Alter. They can't be currently be found in survival (?)

## Structures
Introducing the Tower! This structure will only spawn inside of Badlands, Savannas, and Desert biomes! The loot chest contains many rare items and ores.

## Soul Essence
There is a small chance that Soul Essence can drop from Illager and Undead category mobs after attacking them. Used for crafting a Soul Alter and making tools with it.

## Soul Alter
The Soul Alter is a workstation specifically used to craft the brand new Molten Set! You will need Soul Essence alongside a Molten Infused Ingot to craft tools with it.
